title: Kaworus Ability to Control Unit 02
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu's Ability to Control Unit 02             Quote Post by goldentryst » Sun Jan 07, 2007 5:02 am Hi I'm new here and this is my first topic/post - but anyways going on. Ok first of all Kaworu and Unit 02 are both created from Adam so he could control it. But I read somewhere that Kaworu could control any Eva as long as it was from Adam and had no soul within. But then wasn't Asuka's biological mom's soul inside Unit 02? Since some part of her for sure was left inside the Eva seeing as how all that mental illness and suicide happened. Also, whenever an Angel attacks Toyko-3, the occupants of the city retreat to the Geofront right? Thank you very much for answering all these questions ^^

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sun Jan 07, 2007 5:10 am It's like what Rei said to Asuka in a elevator scene (forgot which one), you have to open yourself up to the Eva because it can think to which Asuka retorts that the Eva and Rei are nothing but dolls. The soul in Unit 02 basically shut itself up after being "ignored" by Asuka and by doing so, Unit 02 pretty much became a doll for which Kaworu to use.

[]:             Quote Post by goldentryst » Sun Jan 07, 2007 5:15 am Ohh I see what you mean. Ty, but, so the Geofront -is- where the people go for safety during an attack right? xD

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jan 07, 2007 12:02 pm There seem to be shelters both inside and above the Geofront; Shinji was in one of the Geofront shelters when Unit 02 got royally smitten by Zeruel, while the shelter Toji and Kensuke snuck out of during the fight with Shamshel was definitely on the surface.

[]: Re: Kaworu's Ability to Control Unit 02             Quote Post by Nukie » Sun Jan 07, 2007 6:43 pm goldentryst wrote: But then wasn't Asuka's biological mom's soul inside Unit 02? Since some part of her for sure was left inside the Eva seeing as how all that mental illness and suicide happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 07, 2007 7:00 pm Tokpile Quohog wrote: It's like what Rei said to Asuka in a elevator scene (forgot which one), you have to open yourself up to the Eva because it can think to which Asuka retorts that the Eva and Rei are nothing but dolls. The soul in Unit 02 basically shut itself up after being "ignored" by Asuka and by doing so, Unit 02 pretty much became a doll for which Kaworu to use.

[]:             Quote Post by goldentryst » Sun Jan 07, 2007 7:33 pm Ah I see what you mean. Wait then, so does a mother's soul HAVE to be within an Eva for her child to control it? Like Touji (Episode 17) he was assigned to be the pilot for 03, so would that mean that his mother's soul was inside it already? Also I just watched a piece of Death & Rebirth where Shinji is after Kaworu going to Terminal Dogma. Kaworu stated that the soul within 02 was shut off, so yeah I guess that answered my first question.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Jan 07, 2007 7:43 pm goldentryst wrote: Wait then, so does a mother's soul HAVE to be within an Eva for her child to control it? Like Touji (Episode 17) he was assigned to be the pilot for 03, so would that mean that his mother's soul was inside it already?

[]:             Quote Post by brainDamage » Sun Jan 07, 2007 7:51 pm Hmmm. I'm gonna have to go home and rewatch some episodes of Eva tonight (as soon as my laundry finishes...damn I hate waiting.) I get the feeling that while there are human souls in the evangelion, they aren't our "puppets" (contrary to what Asuka thought, thereby allowing the degredation of her ability to pilot the thing.) rather, they are (obviously) fair game for influence by either mankind or angels. I'm gonna go with Kaworu simply having the philosophy and mindset that coupled with a closer (perhaps) genetic make-up as the evas, allowed him to take control of it with relative ease.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 07, 2007 10:08 pm They AREN'T puppets, which is exactly what Rei was trying to point out to Asuka in episode 22/22'.

[]:             Quote Post by goldentryst » Mon Jan 08, 2007 6:10 am Ohh that part about Touji's mom makes sense. -Sigh- this makes everything more complicated for the fanfiction I was to write. You don't suppose there could be another way? Like an Angel with the human form like Kaworu comes and is naturally created from Lilith but could control 03 somehow? Does like NERV - and I guess Seele would be involved too - do they all know that an Eva requires a mother's soul? EDITED - Oh and also now that I think about it, Ritsuko's mother (Naoko I think) has her soul inside of 00. Rei is not her child but can still control it despite the errors that occured earlier in the series. Does this happen to be because Rei holds Lilith's soul, or because she knew Naoko, or for some reason? It makes it so Rei is the only one capable of controlling 00 right? Not sure if that made sense sorry. But my last question is: Does it have to be YOUR mother's soul if you wish to control the Eva? For a similar sense, let's say some mother donated their soul or something to an Eva. Would you be able to control it despite it not being your own mother's soul?

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Jan 08, 2007 7:29 am goldentryst wrote: Oh and also now that I think about it, Ritsuko's mother (Naoko I think) has her soul inside of 00.

[]:             Quote Post by goldentryst » Mon Jan 08, 2007 7:37 am Shin-seiki wrote: goldentryst wrote: Oh and also now that I think about it, Ritsuko's mother (Naoko I think) has her soul inside of 00.

[]:             Quote Post by brainDamage » Tue Jan 09, 2007 12:01 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: They AREN'T puppets, which is exactly what Rei was trying to point out to Asuka in episode 22/22'.

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Wed Jan 10, 2007 8:17 am Shin-seiki wrote: goldentryst wrote: Oh and also now that I think about it, Ritsuko's mother (Naoko I think) has her soul inside of 00.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 10, 2007 8:51 am Ejinathan wrote: i was still thinking about what Seele said to Ritsuko.... Ritsuko: i'm just a reinplacement of Rei ...? Does that have nothing to do with eva 00 and Ritsuko's mother...

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Wed Jan 10, 2007 10:07 am thx man... that Gendo keep surprising me hehe

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:13 am Legendary wrote: Actually, Misato says that it took Rei six/seven months to synch with Eva-00, so the scene we see in Episode 05 (taking place twenty-some days before the rest of the episode) isn't anywhere near her first.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:25 am Hyper, this is probably the "thread you want": http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=2206 (If there is a more recent iteration, anyone feel free to point it out.)

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Jun 29, 2010 2:47 am Thank you Reichu, I should just read accurately the CI before starting expressing my doubts (as you may have noticed I came back to EvaGeeks after a long absence, I've read them in the wiki but I'm not familiar with them at all). Anyway according to the CI "he can freely manipulate them", the reference to the "absence of a soul" (more accurately the"closure of the soul" in this case) expressed in episode 24 doesn't seem be a necessary condition; also if there's not this condition and if EVA-01 would have been an exception for Kaworu it would have been feasible for Rei to manipulate 01 as well but Yui can even refuse her if she wanted it (I'm not prone to this conclusion that contrast with NGE especially because 01 doesn't seem to be an excpetion, in the Kaworu ending of that game that you've kindly translated it doesn't seem that they mention Unit 01 as an exception to the disappeared EVAs, there have been a lot of discussion about 01 being at the same time linked to both Adam and Lilith so it could make sense that Rei is unable to freely synchronize).
